name: Alcatel-Lucent
description: Alcatel-Lucent was a French global telecommunications equipment company, headquartered in Boulogne-Billancourt, France. It was formed in 2006 by the merger of France-based Alcatel and US-based Lucent Technologies. The company provided telecommunications hardware, software, and services to service providers, enterprises, and governments worldwide, with a strong focus on fixed, mobile, and converged broadband networking, IP technologies, applications, and services. Alcatel-Lucent was acquired by Nokia in 2016 and subsequently merged into Nokia's operations.
